result.reason: Keyboard shortcuts are conflicting with national keyboard mappings or not behaving as expected, impacting usability for international users.
result.approach: Investigate reported shortcut conflicts on national keyboard layouts. Centralize shortcut definitions and consider making them configurable to allow users to remap problematic shortcuts. If necessary, implement custom key handling to properly interpret keyboard input across different layouts.
